summary: Iteration 16 - Domain routing preparation, SEO, QR codes, Chatbot forbidden/escalation updates. All 14/14 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend testing successful - root URL shows menu, /admin shows login, admin panel works with financials page.
critical_code_review_comments: Routing logic in App.js correctly routes / and /menu to PublicMenuPage, /admin to AdminApp
SEO tags properly configured in index.html - title, og:title, og:description, og:image, JSON-LD Hotel schema
QR Code API returns valid PNG images with configurable size
QR menu-info returns correct domain url=https://kozbeylikonagi.com.tr
Chatbot forbidden topics (siyaset, competitors) are blocked with polite decline responses
Chatbot escalation triggers for 30+ person groups with manager phone number
Chatbot does NOT block valid queries like 'iptal politikasi' (no false positives)
Chatbot correctly returns room prices and extra services info

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Root menu, /menu backward compat, /admin login, dashboard, financials all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified: (1) Routing - / and /menu show PublicMenuPage with categories (Kahvalti, Ekstralar, etc.), /admin shows login and after login shows AdminApp dashboard. (2) SEO - title='Kozbeyli Konagi | Butik Tas Otel - Foca, Izmir', og:title, og:description, og:image present, JSON-LD @type=Hotel with address, geo coordinates, amenities. (3) QR API - GET /api/qr/menu returns image/png (200), GET /api/qr/menu?size=500 returns larger image, GET /api/qr/menu-info returns url=https://kozbeylikonagi.com.tr. (4) Chatbot forbidden - 'siyaset hakkinda' blocked, 'baska otel oner' blocked with polite response. (5) Chatbot escalation - '50 kisilik dugun' and '30 kisi' both trigger manager phone +90 532 234 26 86. (6) Chatbot no false positive - 'iptal politikasi' returns valid cancellation policy, NOT blocked. (7) Chatbot info - 'oda fiyatlari' returns 5 room types with TL prices, 'camasir servisi' returns laundry info.

endpoints./admin: Shows LoginPage, after login shows AdminApp dashboard
